settings.heading: Cash on Delivery
settings.content: Cash on Delivery is available where supported by the courier and Shopify checkout settings. Customers pay the courier when the order is delivered.

settings.heading: COD confirmation
settings.content: COD orders may require phone or WhatsApp confirmation before dispatch. Orders with incomplete address or unreachable phone number may be delayed or cancelled.

settings.heading: Bank transfer / wallet payments
settings.content: If bank transfer, EasyPaisa or JazzCash options are enabled, payment instructions will be shared at checkout or through official Morganics support channels.

settings.heading: Payment safety
settings.content: Only use official Morganics contact details and payment instructions. Do not send payment to unverified numbers or accounts.

settings.heading: Payment issues
settings.content:
If you face a payment issue, contact support with:

  • Order number
  • Payment method
  • Screenshot or reference number if available
  • Name and phone number

settings.heading: Payment Policy
settings.intro: Morganics offers simple payment options for customers ordering natural pantry products across Pakistan.
settings.cta_text: Message us with the product name, desired quantity and your city. Our team will guide you with availability and next steps.
